meaning: n.外观,姿态,装束,伪装v.伪装
examples: But it is back in a new guise.
Extranets: an old solution in a new guise
This book offers good, general personal finance advice in the guise of a novel.
If nothing else, he can issue the clemencies under the guise of budget cuts.
Under the guise of current events, Skolimowski artfully conjures an elemental archetype of human life itself.
